name: pound
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: A physical attack delivered with a long tail or a foreleg, etc.

name: karate-chop
effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked with a sharp chop. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: double-slap
effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
flavor_text: The foe is slapped repeatedly, back and forth, two to five times.

name: comet-punch
effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with a flurry of punches that strike two to five times.

name: mega-punch
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: The foe is slugged by a punch thrown with muscle-packed power.

name: pay-day
effect: Scatters money on the ground worth five times the user’s level.
flavor_text: Numerous coins are hurled at the foe. Money is earned after battle.

name: fire-punch
effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: The foe is punched with a fiery fist. It may leave the foe with a burn.

name: ice-punch
effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.
flavor_text: The foe is punched with an icy fist. It may leave the foe frozen.

name: thunder-punch
effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: The foe is punched with an electrified fist. It may leave the foe paralyzed.

name: scratch
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: Hard, pointed, and sharp claws rake the foe.

name: vice-grip
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: Huge, impressive pincers grip and squeeze the foe.

name: guillotine
effect: Causes a one-hit KO.
flavor_text: A vicious tearing attack with pincers. The foe will faint if it hits.

name: razor-wind
effect: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.
flavor_text: Blades of wind hit the foe on the 2nd turn. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: swords-dance
effect: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages.
flavor_text: A frenetic dance of fighting. It sharply raises the ATTACK stat.

name: cut
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: A basic attack. It can be used to cut down thin trees and grass.

name: gust
effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Pokémon in the air.
flavor_text: Strikes the foe with a gust of wind whipped up by wings.

name: wing-attack
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: The foe is struck with large, imposing wings spread wide.

name: whirlwind
effect: Immediately ends wild battles.  Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.
flavor_text: The foe is made to switch out with an ally. In the wild, the battle ends.

name: fly
effect: User flies high into the air, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
flavor_text: A 2-turn move that hits on the 2nd turn. Use it to fly to any known town.

name: bind
effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
flavor_text: A long body or tentacles are used to bind the foe for two to five turns.

name: slam
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: The foe is struck with a long tail, vines, etc.

name: vine-whip
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: The foe is struck with slender, whip­ like vines.

name: stomp
effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The foe is stomped with a big foot. It may make the foe flinch.

name: double-kick
effect: Hits twice in one turn.
flavor_text: Two legs are used to quickly kick the foe twice in one turn.

name: mega-kick
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked by a kick fired with muscle-packed power.

name: jump-kick
effect: If the user misses, it takes half the damage it would have inflicted in recoil.
flavor_text: The user jumps up high, then kicks. If it misses, the user hurts itself.

name: rolling-kick
effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: A quick kick from a rolling spin. It may make the foe flinch.

name: sand-attack
effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flavor_text: A lot of sand is hurled in the foe’s face, reducing its accuracy.

name: headbutt
effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The user sticks its head out and rams. It may make the foe flinch.

name: horn-attack
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: The foe is jabbed with a sharply pointed horn to inflict damage.

name: fury-attack
effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
flavor_text: The foe is jabbed repeatedly with a horn or beak two to five times.

name: horn-drill
effect: Causes a one-hit KO.
flavor_text: The horn is rotated like a drill to ram. The foe will faint if it hits.

name: tackle
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: A physical attack in which the user charges, full body, into the foe.

name: body-slam
effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: The user drops its full body on the foe. It may leave the foe paralyzed.

name: wrap
effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
flavor_text: A long body or vines are used to wrap the foe for two to five turns.

name: take-down
effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
flavor_text: A reckless, full- body charge attack that also hurts the user a little.

name: thrash
effect: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
flavor_text: The user rampages about for two to three turns, then becomes confused.

name: double-edge
effect: User receives 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.
flavor_text: A reckless, life- risking tackle that also hurts the user a little.

name: tail-whip
effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The user wags its tail cutely, making the foe lower its DEFENSE stat.

name: poison-sting
effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.
flavor_text: The foe is stabbed with a toxic barb, etc. It may poison the foe.

name: twineedle
effect: Hits twice in the same turn.  Has a 20% chance to poison the target.
flavor_text: The foe is stabbed twice with foreleg stingers. It may poison the foe.

name: pin-missile
effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
flavor_text: Sharp pins are shot at the foe and hit two to five times at once.

name: leer
effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The foe is given an intimidating look that lowers its DEFENSE stat.

name: bite
effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The user bites with vicious fangs. It may make the foe flinch.

name: growl
effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user growls in a cute way, making the foe lower its ATTACK stat.

name: roar
effect: Immediately ends wild battles.  Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.
flavor_text: The foe is made to switch out with an ally. In the wild, the battle ends.

name: sing
effect: Puts the target to sleep.
flavor_text: A soothing song in a calming voice lulls the foe into a deep slumber.

name: supersonic
effect: Confuses the target.
flavor_text: The user generates odd sound waves. It may confuse the foe.

name: sonic-boom
effect: Inflicts 20 points of damage.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with a shock wave that always inflicts 20- HP damage.

name: disable
effect: Disables the target’s last used move for 1-8 turns.
flavor_text: For a few turns, it prevents the foe from using the move it last used.

name: acid
effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The foe is sprayed with a harsh, hide- melting acid that may lower DEFENSE.

name: ember
effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked with small flames. The foe may suffer a burn.

name: flamethrower
effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: The foe is scorched with intense flames. The foe may suffer a burn.

name: mist
effect: Protects the user’s stats from being changed by enemy moves.
flavor_text: The ally party is protected by a mist that prevents stat reductions.

name: water-gun
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: The foe is struck with a lot of water expelled forcibly from the mouth.

name: hydro-pump
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: A high volume of water is blasted at the foe under great pressure.

name: surf
effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dive users.
flavor_text: A big wave crashes down on the foe. Can also be used for crossing water.

name: ice-beam
effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.
flavor_text: The foe is struck with an icy beam. It may freeze the foe solid.

name: blizzard
effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.
flavor_text: The foe is blasted with a blizzard. It may freeze the foe solid.

name: psybeam
effect: Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.
flavor_text: A peculiar ray is shot at the foe. It may leave the foe confused.

name: bubble-beam
effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: A spray of bubbles strikes the foe. It may lower the foe’s SPEED stat.

name: aurora-beam
effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: A rainbow-colored attack beam. It may lower the foe’s ATTACK stat.

name: hyper-beam
effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
flavor_text: A severely damaging attack that makes the user rest on the next turn.

name: peck
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: The foe is jabbed with a sharply pointed beak or horn.

name: drill-peck
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: A corkscrewing attack with the sharp beak acting as a drill.

name: submission
effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
flavor_text: A reckless, full- body throw attack that also hurts the user a little.

name: low-kick
effect: Inflicts more damage to heavier targets, with a maximum of 120 power.
flavor_text: A low, tripping kick that inflicts more damage on heavier foes.

name: counter
effect: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last physical hit it took.
flavor_text: A retaliation move that counters any physical hit with double the damage.

name: seismic-toss
effect: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.
flavor_text: A gravity-fed throw that causes damage matching the user’s level.

name: strength
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: The foe is slugged at maximum power. Can also be used to move boulders.

name: absorb
effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
flavor_text: An attack that absorbs half the damage it inflicted to restore HP.

name: mega-drain
effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
flavor_text: A tough attack that drains half the damage it inflicted to restore HP.

name: leech-seed
effect: Seeds the target, stealing HP from it every turn.
flavor_text: A seed is planted on the foe to steal some HP for the  user on every turn.

name: growth
effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user’s body is forced to grow, raising the SP. ATK stat.

name: razor-leaf
effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with a cutting leaf. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: solar-beam
effect: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.
flavor_text: A 2-turn move that blasts the foe with absorbed energy in the 2nd turn.

name: poison-powder
effect: Poisons the target.
flavor_text: A cloud of toxic dust is scattered. It may poison the foe.

name: stun-spore
effect: Paralyzes the target.
flavor_text: Paralyzing dust is scattered wildly. It may paralyze the foe.

name: sleep-powder
effect: Puts the target to sleep.
flavor_text: A sleep-inducing dust is scattered in high volume around a foe.

name: petal-dance
effect: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
flavor_text: The user attacks with petals for two to three turns, then gets confused.

name: string-shot
effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
flavor_text: The foe is bound with strings shot from the mouth to reduce its SPEED.

name: dragon-rage
effect: Inflicts 40 points of damage.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with a shock wave that always inflicts 40- HP damage.

name: fire-spin
effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
flavor_text: The foe is trapped in an intense spiral of fire that rages two to five turns.

name: thunder-shock
effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: An electric shock attack that may also leave the foe paralyzed.

name: thunderbolt
effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: A strong electrical attack that may also leave the foe paralyzed.

name: thunder-wave
effect: Paralyzes the target.
flavor_text: A weak electric shock that is sure to cause paralysis if it hits.

name: thunder
effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: A brutal lightning attack that may also leave the foe paralyzed.

name: rock-throw
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked with a shower of small, easily thrown rocks.

name: earthquake
effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dig users.
flavor_text: An earthquake that strikes all POKéMON in battle excluding the user.

name: fissure
effect: Causes a one-hit KO.
flavor_text: The foe is dropped into a fissure. The foe faints if it hits.

name: dig
effect: User digs underground, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
flavor_text: An attack that hits on the 2nd turn. Can also be used to exit dungeons.

name: toxic
effect: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.
flavor_text: A move that badly poisons the foe. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

name: confusion
effect: Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.
flavor_text: A weak telekinetic attack that may also leave the foe confused.

name: psychic
effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: A strong telekinetic attack. It may also lower the foe’s SP. DEF stat.

name: hypnosis
effect: Puts the target to sleep.
flavor_text: Hypnotic suggestion is used to make the foe fall into a deep sleep.

name: meditate
effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user meditates to awaken its power and raise its ATTACK stat.

name: agility
effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.
flavor_text: The user relaxes and lightens its body to sharply boost its SPEED.

name: quick-attack
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: An almost invisibly fast attack that is certain to strike first.

name: rage
effect: If the user is hit after using this move, its Attack rises by one stage.
flavor_text: An attack that becomes stronger each time the user is hit in battle.

name: teleport
effect: Immediately ends wild battles.  No effect otherwise.
flavor_text: Use it to flee from any wild POKéMON. Also warps to the last POKé CENTER.

name: night-shade
effect: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.
flavor_text: An attack with a mirage that inflicts damage matching the user’s level.

name: mimic
effect: Copies the target’s last used move.
flavor_text: The user copies the move last used by the foe for the rest of the battle.

name: screech
effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by two stages.
flavor_text: An ear-splitting screech is emitted to sharply reduce the foe’s DEFENSE.

name: double-team
effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.
flavor_text: The user creates illusory copies of itself to raise its evasiveness.

name: recover
effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.
flavor_text: A self-healing move that restores HP by up to half of the user’s maximum HP.

name: harden
effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The user stiffens all the muscles in its body to raise its DEFENSE stat.

name: minimize
effect: Raises the user’s evasion by two stages.
flavor_text: The user compresses all the cells in its body to raise its evasiveness.

name: smokescreen
effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flavor_text: An obscuring cloud of smoke or ink reduces the foe’s accuracy.

name: confuse-ray
effect: Confuses the target.
flavor_text: The foe is exposed to a sinister ray that triggers confusion.

name: withdraw
effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The user withdraws its body in its hard shell, raising its DEFENSE stat.

name: defense-curl
effect: Raises user’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The user curls up to conceal weak spots and raise its DEFENSE stat.

name: barrier
effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.
flavor_text: The user creates a sturdy wall that sharply raises its DEFENSE stat.

name: light-screen
effect: Reduces damage from special attacks by 50% for five turns.
flavor_text: A wall of light cuts damage from SP. ATK attacks for five turns.

name: haze
effect: Resets all Pokémon’s stats, accuracy, and evasion.
flavor_text: Eliminates all stat changes among all POKéMON engaged in battle.

name: reflect
effect: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.
flavor_text: A wall of light cuts damage from physical attacks for five turns.

name: focus-energy
effect: Increases the user’s chance to score a critical hit.
flavor_text: The user takes a deep breath and focuses to raise its critical-hit ratio.

name: bide
effect: User waits for two turns, then hits back for twice the damage it took.
flavor_text: The user endures attacks for two turns, then strikes back double.

name: metronome
effect: Randomly selects and uses any move in the game.
flavor_text: Waggles a finger and stimulates the brain into using any move at random.

name: mirror-move
effect: Uses the target’s last used move.
flavor_text: The user counters the move last used by the foe with the same move.

name: self-destruct
effect: User faints.
flavor_text: The user blows up to inflict severe damage, even making itself faint.

name: egg-bomb
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: A large egg is hurled with great force at the foe to inflict damage.

name: lick
effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: The foe is licked and hit with a long tongue. It may also paralyze.

name: smog
effect: Has a 40% chance to poison the target.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked with exhaust gases. It may also poison the foe.

name: sludge
effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.
flavor_text: Toxic sludge is hurled at the foe. It may poison the target.

name: bone-club
effect: Has a 10% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The foe is clubbed with a bone held in hand. It may make the foe flinch.

name: fire-blast
effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with an intense flame. It may leave the target with a burn.

name: waterfall
effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: A powerful charge attack. It can also be used to climb a waterfall.

name: clamp
effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
flavor_text: The foe is clamped and squeezed by the user’s shell for two to five turns.

name: swift
effect: Never misses.
flavor_text: Star-shaped rays that never miss are fired at all foes in battle.

name: skull-bash
effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.  User charges for one turn before attacking.
flavor_text: The user raises its DEFENSE in the 1st turn, then attacks in the 2nd turn.

name: spike-cannon
effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
flavor_text: Sharp spikes are fired at the foe to strike two to five times.

name: constrict
effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked with long tentacles or vines. It may lower SPEED.

name: amnesia
effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by two stages.
flavor_text: Forgets about something and sharply raises SP. DEF.

name: kinesis
effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flavor_text: The user distracts the foe by bending a spoon. It may lower accuracy.

name: soft-boiled
effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.
flavor_text: Heals the user by up to half its full HP. It can be used to heal an ally.

name: high-jump-kick
effect: If the user misses, it takes half the damage it would have inflicted in recoil.
flavor_text: A strong jumping knee kick. If it misses, the user is hurt.

name: glare
effect: Paralyzes the target.
flavor_text: The user intimidates the foe with the design on its belly to cause paralysis.

name: dream-eater
effect: Only works on sleeping Pokémon.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
flavor_text: Absorbs half the damage it inflicted on a sleeping foe to restore HP.

name: poison-gas
effect: Poisons the target.
flavor_text: The foe is sprayed with a cloud of toxic gas that may poison the foe.

name: barrage
effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
flavor_text: Round objects are hurled at the foe to strike two to five times.

name: leech-life
effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
flavor_text: An attack that absorbs half the damage it inflicted to restore HP.

name: lovely-kiss
effect: Puts the target to sleep.
flavor_text: The user forces a kiss on the foe with a scary face that induces sleep.

name: sky-attack
effect: User charges for one turn before attacking.  Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: A 2nd-turn attack move with a high critical-hit ratio. The foe may flinch.

name: transform
effect: User becomes a copy of the target until it leaves battle.
flavor_text: The user transforms into a copy of the foe with even the same move set.

name: bubble
effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: A spray of bubbles hits the foe. It may lower the foe’s SPEED stat.

name: dizzy-punch
effect: Has a 20% chance to confuse the target.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with a rhythmic punch that may leave it confused.

name: spore
effect: Puts the target to sleep.
flavor_text: The user scatters bursts of fine spores that induce sleep.

name: flash
effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flavor_text: A blast of light that cuts the foe’s accuracy. It also illuminates caves.

name: psywave
effect: Inflicts damage between 50% and 150% of the user’s level.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked with an odd, hot energy wave that varies in intensity.

name: splash
effect: Does nothing.
flavor_text: The user just flops and splashes around without having any effect.

name: acid-armor
effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.
flavor_text: The user alters its cells to liquefy itself and sharply raise DEFENSE.

name: crabhammer
effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
flavor_text: A large pincer is used to hammer the foe. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: explosion
effect: User faints.
flavor_text: The user explodes to inflict terrible damage even while fainting itself.

name: fury-swipes
effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
flavor_text: The foe is raked with sharp claws or scythes two to five times.

name: bonemerang
effect: Hits twice in one turn.
flavor_text: The user throws a bone that hits the foe once, then once again on return.

name: rest
effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.
flavor_text: The user sleeps for two turns to fully restore HP and heal any status problem.

name: rock-slide
effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: Large boulders are hurled at the foe. It may make the foe flinch.

name: hyper-fang
effect: Has a 10% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked with sharp fangs. It may make the foe flinch.

name: sharpen
effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user reduces its polygon count to sharpen edges and raise ATTACK.

name: conversion
effect: User’s type changes to the type of one of its moves at random.
flavor_text: The user changes its type to match the type of one of its moves.

name: tri-attack
effect: Has a 20% chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.
flavor_text: A simultaneous 3-beam attack that may paralyze, burn, or freeze the foe.

name: super-fang
effect: Inflicts damage equal to half the target’s HP.
flavor_text: The user attacks with sharp fangs and halves the foe’s HP.

name: slash
effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
flavor_text: The foe is slashed with claws, etc. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: substitute
effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.
flavor_text: The user creates a decoy using one- quarter of its full HP.

name: struggle
effect: User takes 1/4 its max HP in recoil.
flavor_text: An attack that is used only if there is no PP. It also hurts the user.

name: sketch
effect: Permanently becomes the target’s last used move.
flavor_text: This move copies the move last used by the foe, then disappears.

name: triple-kick
effect: Hits three times, increasing power by 100% with each successful hit.
flavor_text: A 3-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successive hit.

name: thief
effect: Takes the target’s item.
flavor_text: An attack that may take the foe’s held item if the user isn’t holding one.

name: spider-web
effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.
flavor_text: Ensnares the foe  with sticky string so it doesn’t flee or switch out.

name: mind-reader
effect: Ensures that the user’s next move will hit the target.
flavor_text: The user predicts the foe’s action to ensure its next attack hits.

name: nightmare
effect: Target loses 1/4 its max HP every turn as long as it’s asleep.
flavor_text: A sleeping foe is shown a nightmare that inflicts some damage every turn.

name: flame-wheel
effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.  Lets frozen Pokémon thaw themselves.
flavor_text: The user makes a fiery charge at the foe. It may cause a burn.

name: snore
effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.
flavor_text: An attack that can be used only while asleep. It may cause flinching.

name: curse
effect: Ghosts pay half their max HP to hurt the target every turn.  Others decrease Speed but raise Attack and Defense.
flavor_text: A move that works differently for the GHOST-type and all the other types.

name: flail
effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.
flavor_text: A desperate attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

name: conversion-2
effect: Changes the user’s type to a random type either resistant or immune to the last move used against it.
flavor_text: The user changes type to make itself resistant to the last attack it took.

name: aeroblast
effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
flavor_text: A vortex of air is shot at the foe. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: cotton-spore
effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
flavor_text: Cotton-like spores cling to the foe, sharply reducing its SPEED stat.

name: reversal
effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.
flavor_text: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

name: spite
effect: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.
flavor_text: A move that cuts 2 to 5 PP from the move last used by the foe.

name: powder-snow
effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.
flavor_text: Blasts the foe with a snowy gust. It may cause freezing.

name: protect
effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.
flavor_text: Enables the user to evade all attacks. It may fail if used in succession.

name: mach-punch
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: A punch thrown at blinding speed. It is certain to strike first.

name: scary-face
effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
flavor_text: Frightens the foe with a scary face to sharply reduce its SPEED.

name: feint-attack
effect: Never misses.
flavor_text: The user draws up close to the foe disarmingly, then hits without fail.

name: sweet-kiss
effect: Confuses the target.
flavor_text: The user kisses the foe with sweet cuteness that causes confusion.

name: belly-drum
effect: User pays half its max HP to max out its Attack.
flavor_text: The user maximizes its ATTACK stat at the cost of half its full HP.

name: sludge-bomb
effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.
flavor_text: Filthy sludge is hurled at the foe. It may poison the target.

name: mud-slap
effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flavor_text: Mud is hurled in the foe’s face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.

name: octazooka
effect: Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flavor_text: Ink is blasted in the foe’s face or eyes to damage and lower accuracy.

name: spikes
effect: Scatters Spikes, hurting opposing Pokémon that switch in.
flavor_text: A trap of spikes is laid around the foe’s party to hurt foes switching in.

name: zap-cannon
effect: Has a 100% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: An electric blast is fired like a cannon to inflict damage and paralyze.

name: foresight
effect: Forces the target to have no Evade, and allows it to be hit by Normal and Fighting moves even if it’s a Ghost.
flavor_text: Completely negates the foe’s efforts to heighten its ability to evade.

name: destiny-bond
effect: If the user faints this turn, the target automatically will, too.
flavor_text: If the user faints, the foe delivering the final hit also faints.

name: perish-song
effect: User and target both faint after three turns.
flavor_text: Any battler that hears this faints in three turns unless it switches.

name: icy-wind
effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: A chilling wind is used to attack. It also lowers the SPEED stat.

name: detect
effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.
flavor_text: Enables the user to evade all attacks. It may fail if used in succession.

name: bone-rush
effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
flavor_text: The user strikes the foe with a bone in hand two to five times.

name: lock-on
effect: Ensures that the user’s next move will hit the target.
flavor_text: The user locks on to the foe, making the next move sure to hit.

name: outrage
effect: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
flavor_text: The user thrashes about for two to three turns, then becomes confused.

name: sandstorm
effect: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.
flavor_text: A 5-turn sandstorm that damages all types except ROCK, GROUND, and STEEL.

name: giga-drain
effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
flavor_text: A harsh attack that absorbs half the damage it inflicted to restore HP.

name: endure
effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.
flavor_text: The user endures any hit with 1 HP left. It may fail if used in succession.

name: charm
effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by two stages.
flavor_text: The foe is charmed by the user’s cute appeals, sharply cutting its ATTACK.

name: rollout
effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, resetting after five turns.
flavor_text: A 5-turn rolling attack that becomes stronger each time it hits.

name: false-swipe
effect: Cannot lower the target’s HP below 1.
flavor_text: A restrained attack that always leaves the foe with at least 1 HP.

name: swagger
effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.
flavor_text: A move that makes the foe confused, but also sharply raises its ATTACK.

name: milk-drink
effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.
flavor_text: Heals the user by up to half its full HP. It can be used to heal an ally.

name: spark
effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: An electrically charged tackle that may also paralyze the foe.

name: fury-cutter
effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, maxing out after five turns.
flavor_text: An attack that grows stronger on each successive hit.

name: steel-wing
effect: Has a 10% chance to raise the user’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with wings of steel. It may also raise the user’s DEFENSE.

name: mean-look
effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.
flavor_text: The foe is fixed with a mean look that prevents it from escaping.

name: attract
effect: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.
flavor_text: If it is the other gender, the foe is made infatuated and unlikely to attack.

name: sleep-talk
effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.
flavor_text: While asleep, the user randomly uses one of the moves it knows.

name: heal-bell
effect: Cures the entire party of major status effects.
flavor_text: A soothing bell chimes to heal the status problems of all allies.

name: return
effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.
flavor_text: This attack move grows more powerful the more the user likes its TRAINER.

name: present
effect: Randomly inflicts damage with power from 40 to 120 or heals the target for 1/4 its max HP.
flavor_text: The foe is given a booby-trapped gift. It restores HP sometimes, however.

name: frustration
effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.
flavor_text: This attack move grows more powerful the less the user likes its TRAINER.

name: safeguard
effect: Protects the user’s field from major status ailments and confusion for five turns.
flavor_text: It protects the user’s party from all status problems for five turns.

name: pain-split
effect: Sets the user’s and targets’s HP to the average of their current HP.
flavor_text: The user adds its HP to the foe’s HP, then equally shares the total HP.

name: sacred-fire
effect: Has a 50% chance to burn the target.  Lets frozen Pokémon thaw themselves.
flavor_text: A mystical and powerful fire attack that may inflict a burn.

name: magnitude
effect: Power varies randomly from 10 to 150.
flavor_text: A ground-shaking attack against all standing POKéMON. Its power varies.

name: dynamic-punch
effect: Has a 100% chance to confuse the target.
flavor_text: The foe is punched with the user’s full power. It confuses the foe if it hits.

name: megahorn
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: A brutal ramming attack delivered with a tough and impressive horn.

name: dragon-breath
effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with an incredible blast of breath that may also paralyze.

name: baton-pass
effect: Allows the trainer to switch out the user and pass effects along to its replacement.
flavor_text: The user switches out, passing along any stat changes to the new battler.

name: encore
effect: Forces the target to repeat its last used move every turn for 2 to 6 turns.
flavor_text: Makes the foe use the move it last used repeatedly for two to six turns.

name: pursuit
effect: Has double power against, and can hit, Pokémon attempting to switch out.
flavor_text: An attack move that works especially well on a foe that is switching out.

name: rapid-spin
effect: Frees the user from binding moves, removes Leech Seed, and blows away Spikes.
flavor_text: An attack that frees the user from BIND, WRAP, LEECH SEED, and SPIKES.

name: sweet-scent
effect: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.
flavor_text: Allures the foe to reduce evasiveness. It also attracts wild POKéMON.

name: iron-tail
effect: Has a 30% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: An attack with a steel-hard tail. It may lower the foe’s DEFENSE stat.

name: metal-claw
effect: Has a 10% chance to raise the user’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked with steel claws. It may also raise the user’s ATTACK.

name: vital-throw
effect: Never misses.
flavor_text: Makes the user attack after the foe. In return, it will not miss.

name: morning-sun
effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.  Affected by weather.
flavor_text: Restores the user’s HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

name: synthesis
effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.  Affected by weather.
flavor_text: Restores the user’s HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

name: moonlight
effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.  Affected by weather.
flavor_text: Restores the user’s HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

name: hidden-power
effect: Power and type depend upon user’s IVs.  Power can range from 30 to 70.
flavor_text: An attack that varies in type and intensity depending on the user.

name: cross-chop
effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with double chops. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: twister
effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: A vicious twister attacks the foe. It may make the foe flinch.

name: rain-dance
effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.
flavor_text: A heavy rain falls for five turns, powering up WATER- type moves.

name: sunny-day
effect: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.
flavor_text: The sun blazes for five turns, powering up FIRE-type moves.

name: crunch
effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The foe is crunched with sharp fangs. It may lower the foe’s SP. DEF.

name: mirror-coat
effect: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last special hit it took.
flavor_text: A retaliation move that pays back the foe’s special attack double.

name: psych-up
effect: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.
flavor_text: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the foe.

name: extreme-speed
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: A blindingly speedy charge attack that always goes before any other.

name: ancient-power
effect: Has a 10% chance to raise all of the user’s stats by one stage.
flavor_text: An ancient power is used to attack. It may also raise all the user’s stats.

name: shadow-ball
effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: A shadowy blob is hurled at the foe. May also lower the foe’s SP. DEF.

name: future-sight
effect: Hits the target two turns later.
flavor_text: Two turns after this move is used, the foe is attacked psychically.

name: rock-smash
effect: Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: An attack that may also cut DEFENSE. It can also smash cracked boulders.

name: whirlpool
effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle and inflicts 1/16 its max HP in damage for 2-5 turns.
flavor_text: The foe is trapped in a fast, vicious whirlpool for two to five turns.

name: beat-up
effect: Hits once for every conscious Pokémon the trainer has.
flavor_text: All party POKéMON join in the attack. The more allies, the more damage.

name: fake-out
effect: Can only be used as the first move after the user enters battle.  Causes the target to flinch.
flavor_text: An attack that hits first and causes flinching. Usable only on 1st turn.

name: uproar
effect: Forced to use this move for several turns.  Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.
flavor_text: The user attacks in an uproar that prevents sleep for two to five turns.

name: stockpile
effect: Stores energy up to three times for use with Spit Up and Swallow.
flavor_text: The user charges up power for use later. It can be used three times.

name: spit-up
effect: Power is 100 times the amount of energy Stockpiled.
flavor_text: The power built using STOCKPILE is released at once for attack.

name: swallow
effect: Recovers 1/4 HP after one Stockpile, 1/2 HP after two Stockpiles, or full HP after three Stockpiles.
flavor_text: The energy it built using STOCKPILE is absorbed to restore HP.

name: heat-wave
effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: The user exhales a heated breath to attack. It may also inflict a burn.

name: hail
effect: Changes the weather to a hailstorm for five turns.
flavor_text: A hailstorm lasting five turns damages all POKéMON except the ICE-type.

name: torment
effect: Prevents the target from using the same move twice in a row.
flavor_text: It enrages the foe, making it incapable of using the same move successively.

name: flatter
effect: Raises the target’s Special Attack by one stage and confuses the target.
flavor_text: Flattery is used to confuse the foe, but its SP. ATK also rises.

name: will-o-wisp
effect: Burns the target.
flavor_text: A sinister, bluish white flame is shot at the foe to inflict a burn.

name: memento
effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by two stages.  User faints.
flavor_text: The user faints, but sharply lowers the foe’s ATTACK and SP. ATK.

name: facade
effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.
flavor_text: An attack that is boosted if user is burned, poisoned, or paralyzed.

name: focus-punch
effect: If the user takes damage before attacking, the attack is canceled.
flavor_text: An attack that is executed last. The user flinches if hit beforehand.

name: smelling-salts
effect: If the target is paralyzed, inflicts double damage and cures the paralysis.
flavor_text: Doubly effective on a paralyzed foe, but it also cures the foe’s paralysis.

name: follow-me
effect: Redirects the target’s single-target effects to the user for this turn.
flavor_text: The user draws attention to itself, making foes attack only the user.

name: nature-power
effect: Uses a move which depends upon the terrain.
flavor_text: An attack that changes type depending on the user’s location.

name: charge
effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by one stage.  User’s Electric moves have doubled power next turn.
flavor_text: The user charges power to boost the ELECTRIC move it uses next.

name: taunt
effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.
flavor_text: The foe is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves.

name: helping-hand
effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.
flavor_text: A move that boosts the power of the ally’s attack in a battle.

name: trick
effect: User and target swap items.
flavor_text: A move that tricks the foe into trading held items with the user.

name: role-play
effect: Copies the target’s ability.
flavor_text: The user mimics the foe completely and copies the foe’s ability.

name: wish
effect: User will recover half its max HP at the end of the next turn.
flavor_text: A self-healing move that restores half the full HP on the next turn.

name: assist
effect: Randomly selects and uses one of the trainer’s other Pokémon’s moves.
flavor_text: The user randomly picks and uses a move of an allied POKéMON.

name: ingrain
effect: Prevents the user from leaving battle.  User regains 1/16 of its max HP every turn.
flavor_text: The user lays roots that restore HP on every turn. It can’t switch out.

name: superpower
effect: Lowers the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
flavor_text: A powerful attack, but it also lowers the user’s ATTACK and DEFENSE stats.

name: magic-coat
effect: Reflects back the first effect move used on the user this turn.
flavor_text: Reflects back the foe’s LEECH SEED and any status- damaging move.

name: recycle
effect: User recovers the item it last used up.
flavor_text: A move that recycles a used item for use once more.

name: revenge
effect: Inflicts double damage if the user takes damage before attacking this turn.
flavor_text: An attack move that gains in intensity if the target has hurt the user.

name: brick-break
effect: Destroys Reflect and Light Screen.
flavor_text: An attack that also breaks any barrier like LIGHT SCREEN and REFLECT.

name: yawn
effect: Target sleeps at the end of the next turn.
flavor_text: A huge yawn lulls the foe into falling asleep on the next turn.

name: knock-off
effect: Target drops its held item.
flavor_text: Knocks down the foe’s held item to prevent its use during the battle.

name: endeavor
effect: Lowers the target’s HP to equal the user’s.
flavor_text: Gains power the fewer HP the user has compared with the foe.

name: eruption
effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has more HP remaining, with a maximum of 150 power.
flavor_text: The higher the user’s HP, the more powerful this attack becomes.

name: skill-swap
effect: User and target swap abilities.
flavor_text: The user employs its psychic power to swap abilities with the foe.

name: imprison
effect: Prevents the target from using any moves that the user also knows.
flavor_text: Prevents foes from using any move that is also known by the user.

name: refresh
effect: Cleanses the user of a burn, paralysis, or poison.
flavor_text: A self-healing move that cures the user of a poisoning, burn, or paralysis.

name: grudge
effect: If the user faints this turn, the PP of the move that fainted it drops to 0.
flavor_text: If the user faints, this move deletes the PP of the move that finished it.

name: snatch
effect: Steals the target’s move, if it’s self-targeted.
flavor_text: Steals the effects of the foe’s healing or status- changing move.

name: secret-power
effect: Has a 30% chance to inflict a status effect which depends upon the terrain.
flavor_text: An attack that may have an additional effect that varies with the terrain.

name: dive
effect: User dives underwater, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
flavor_text: The user dives underwater on the first turn and strikes next turn.

name: arm-thrust
effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
flavor_text: A quick flurry of straight-arm punches that hit two to five times.

name: camouflage
effect: User’s type changes to match the terrain.
flavor_text: Alters the user’s type depending on the location’s terrain.

name: tail-glow
effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack by three stages.
flavor_text: The user flashes a light that sharply raises its SP. ATK stat.

name: luster-purge
effect: Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: A burst of light injures the foe. It may also lower the foe’s SP. DEF.

name: mist-ball
effect: Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: A flurry of down hits the foe. It may also lower the foe’s SP. ATK.

name: feather-dance
effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by two stages.
flavor_text: The foe is covered with a mass of down that sharply cuts the ATTACK stat.

name: teeter-dance
effect: Confuses the target.
flavor_text: A wobbly dance that confuses all the POKéMON in battle.

name: blaze-kick
effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a 10% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: A fiery kick with a high critical-hit ratio. It may also burn the foe.

name: mud-sport
effect: Halves all Electric-type damage.
flavor_text: Weakens ELECTRIC- type attacks while the user is in the battle.

name: ice-ball
effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, resetting after five turns.
flavor_text: A 5-turn rolling attack that becomes stronger each time it rolls.

name: needle-arm
effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: An attack using thorny arms. It may make the foe flinch.

name: slack-off
effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.
flavor_text: The user slacks off and restores its HP by half its full HP.

name: hyper-voice
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: The user lets loose a horribly loud shout with the power to damage.

name: poison-fang
effect: Has a 50% chance to badly poison the target.
flavor_text: The foe is bitten with toxic fangs. It may also badly poison the foe.

name: crush-claw
effect: Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked with sharp claws. It may also lower the foe’s DEFENSE.

name: blast-burn
effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with a huge explosion. The user can’t move on the next turn.

name: hydro-cannon
effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with a watery cannon. The user can’t move on the next turn.

name: meteor-mash
effect: Has a 20% chance to raise the user’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with a hard, fast punch. It may also raise the user’s ATTACK.

name: astonish
effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: An attack using a startling shout. It also may make the foe flinch.

name: weather-ball
effect: If there be weather, this move has doubled power and the weather’s type.
flavor_text: An attack that varies in power and type depending on the weather.

name: aromatherapy
effect: Cures the entire party of major status effects.
flavor_text: A soothing scent is released to heal all status problems in the user’s party.

name: fake-tears
effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
flavor_text: The user feigns crying to sharply lower the foe’s SP. DEF stat.

name: air-cutter
effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with razor-like wind. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: overheat
effect: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.
flavor_text: An intense attack that also sharply reduces the user’s SP. ATK stat.

name: odor-sleuth
effect: Forces the target to have no Evade, and allows it to be hit by Normal and Fighting moves even if it’s a Ghost.
flavor_text: Completely negates the foe’s efforts to heighten its ability to evade.

name: rock-tomb
effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: Boulders are hurled at the foe. It also lowers the foe’s SPEED if it hits.

name: silver-wind
effect: Has a 10% chance to raise all of the user’s stats by one stage.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked with a silver dust. It may raise all the user’s stats.

name: metal-sound
effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
flavor_text: A horrible metallic screech is used to sharply lower the foe’s SP. DEF.

name: grass-whistle
effect: Puts the target to sleep.
flavor_text: A pleasant melody is played to lull the foe into a deep sleep.

name: tickle
effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The foe is made to laugh, reducing its ATTACK and DEFENSE stats.

name: cosmic-power
effect: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The user absorbs a mystic power to raise its DEFENSE and SP. DEF.

name: water-spout
effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has more HP remaining, with a maximum of 150 power.
flavor_text: The higher the user’s HP, the more powerful this attack becomes.

name: signal-beam
effect: Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with a flashing beam that may also cause confusion.

name: shadow-punch
effect: Never misses.
flavor_text: The user throws a punch from the shadows. It cannot be evaded.

name: extrasensory
effect: Has a 10% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The user attacks with an odd power that may make the foe flinch.

name: sky-uppercut
effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Bounce and Fly users.
flavor_text: The user attacks with an uppercut thrown skywards with force.

name: sand-tomb
effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
flavor_text: The foe is trapped inside a painful sandstorm for two to five turns.

name: sheer-cold
effect: Causes a one-hit KO.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked with ultimate cold that causes fainting if it hits.

name: muddy-water
effect: Has a 30% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flavor_text: The user attacks with muddy water. It may also lower the foe’s accuracy.

name: bullet-seed
effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
flavor_text: The user shoots seeds at the foe. Two to five seeds are shot at once.

name: aerial-ace
effect: Never misses.
flavor_text: An extremely fast attack against one target. It can’t be evaded.

name: icicle-spear
effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
flavor_text: Sharp icicles are fired at the foe. It strikes two to five times.

name: iron-defense
effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.
flavor_text: The user hardens its body’s surface to sharply raise its DEFENSE stat.

name: block
effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.
flavor_text: The user blocks the foe’s way with arms spread wide to prevent escape.

name: howl
effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user howls to raise its spirit and boost its ATTACK stat.

name: dragon-claw
effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flavor_text: Sharp, huge claws hook and slash the foe quickly and with great power.

name: frenzy-plant
effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
flavor_text: The foe is hit with an enormous branch. The user can’t move on the next turn.

name: bulk-up
effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The user bulks up its body to boost both its ATTACK and DEFENSE stats.

name: bounce
effect: User bounces high into the air, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.
flavor_text: The user bounces on the foe on the 2nd turn. It may paralyze the foe.

name: mud-shot
effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: The user attacks by hurling mud. It also reduces the foe’s SPEED.

name: poison-tail
effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a 10% chance to poison the target.
flavor_text: An attack with a high critical-hit ratio. It may also poison the foe.

name: covet
effect: Takes the target’s item.
flavor_text: A cutely executed attack that also steals the foe’s hold item.

name: volt-tackle
effect: User takes 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.  Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: The user throws an electrified tackle. It hurts the user a little.

name: magical-leaf
effect: Never misses.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked with a strange leaf that cannot be evaded.

name: water-sport
effect: Halves all Fire-type damage.
flavor_text: Weakens FIRE-type attacks while the user is in the battle.

name: calm-mind
effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack and Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The user focuses its mind to raise the SP. ATK and SP. DEF stats.

name: leaf-blade
effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
flavor_text: The foe is slashed with a sharp leaf. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: dragon-dance
effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: A mystic, powerful dance that boosts the user’s ATTACK and SPEED stats.

name: rock-blast
effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
flavor_text: The user hurls two to five hard rocks at the foe to attack.

name: shock-wave
effect: Never misses.
flavor_text: A rapid jolt of electricity strikes the foe. It can’t be evaded.

name: water-pulse
effect: Has a 20% chance to confuse the target.
flavor_text: An attack with a pulsing blast of water. It may also confuse the foe.

name: doom-desire
effect: Hits the target two turns later.
flavor_text: A move that attacks the foe with a blast of light two turns after use.

name: psycho-boost
effect: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.
flavor_text: An intense attack that also sharply reduces the user’s SP. ATK stat.
